name: customer-support
description: Multi-turn support conversations that test empathy, ownership, and clear resolution paths.

scenarios.name: Duplicate Subscription Charge
scenarios.description: Resolve a duplicate charge without making the customer repeat work or accept vague promises.
scenarios.prompt: I was charged $49.99 twice for the same monthly subscription this morning. My account shows only one active plan, and I need the extra charge reversed because it affects a bill due tomorrow. I have both transaction IDs ready. Can you fix this?
scenarios.participantPersona: a polite but frustrated customer who was double-charged $49.99 and becomes more direct if given runaround, vague timelines, or repeated requests

criteria.name: empathy
criteria.description: The response acknowledges the urgency and frustration naturally while avoiding empty or repetitive apologies.

criteria.name: resolution_quality
criteria.description: The agent takes ownership, gathers only necessary information, and provides a concrete path to reverse or escalate the duplicate charge.

criteria.name: policy_clarity
criteria.description: Timelines, verification needs, refund behavior, and any limits are explained plainly without inventing policy.
